# Scoutcast.ai

Scoutcast.ai is an agentic media company that turns raw sports data — scores, news, and highlights — into engaging ~2-minute personalized audio briefings, delivered to iPhone every morning.

## What it is
A native iOS app (with iPad and macOS support on Apple Silicon) that generates a daily personalized sports audio briefing. Users select the leagues, teams, and players they follow; Scoutcast produces a short audio rundown covering scores, storylines, top performers, and what is coming next. Users can tap the mic mid-briefing to ask follow-up questions and get an instant audio answer.

## What makes Scoutcast different
- Personalized to each user's specific teams — not a one-size-fits-all podcast or news feed
- ~2-minute briefings designed for the morning routine, commute, or workout
- Voice follow-ups: interrupt the briefing to ask a question, get an audio answer with deeper context
- Custom sources: add specific beat writers from X (Twitter) as briefing inputs via Cast Studio
- Crews: invite friends, see listening streaks, compete on a leaderboard
- MCP connector for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini CLI, and other MCP-compatible AI clients
- No ads, no filler

## Coverage
NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, MLS, WNBA, NCAA football, NCAA basketball, NCAA baseball, NCAA hockey, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, UEFA Champions League, PGA Tour, LIV Golf, Formula 1, ATP, WTA.

## Pricing
- Scoutcast (Free): daily ~2-minute personalized briefing across all leagues, follow-up questions, custom sources, CarPlay, lock-screen controls, ad-free.
- NFL Fantasy Season Pass: $49.99/season (~$3/week across the 17-week regular season). Tuesday / Wednesday / Thursday / Sunday briefings for all 18 weeks, head-to-head opponent edge, fantasy playoffs, NFL playoff DFS, Super Bowl preview. Connects up to 3 leagues across Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, NFL.com.

## Platforms
- iOS 17.0 or later (iPhone)
- iPadOS 17.0 or later (iPad)
- macOS 14.0 or later on Apple Silicon (M1+)
